children.name: heading
children.label: Heading
children.help_text: Optional heading displayed above the card grid.

children.name: heading_type
children.label: Heading Level
children.help_text: Semantic heading level. Use H2 for top-level sections, H3 if nested under another heading.

children.name: subheading
children.label: Subheading
children.help_text: Optional subheading displayed below the main heading.

children.name: link
children.label: Link
children.help_text: Optional call-to-action link displayed below the card grid.

help_text: Optional anchor ID for in-page navigation links.
